mapper.select: SELECT CODE_VALUE AS codeValue, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM TB_COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, CODE_VALUE ASC

SELECT GROUP_CODE AS groupCode, GROUP_NAME AS groupName, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark FROM TB_GROUP_CODE
AND GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%')
ORDER BY GROUP_CODE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_GROUP_CODE (GROUP_CODE, GROUP_NAME, USE_YN, REMARK) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{groupName}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode}

SELECT GROUP_CODE AS groupCode, CODE_VALUE AS codeValue, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark FROM TB_COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, CODE_VALUE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMMON_CODE (GROUP_CODE, CODE_VALUE, CODE_NAME, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, REMARK) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{codeValue}, #{codeName}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 1), COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY_CD AS companyCd, PROD_CD AS prodCd, OPT_CD AS optCd, CONTRACT_CD AS contractCd, DISCOUNT_CD AS discountCd, VAS_CD AS vasCd FROM TB_PROD_CASCADE_MAP WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
